title: Container With Most Water
pattern: Two Pointers â€” Greedy Width Reduction
coreIdea: Maximize the area formed between two vertical lines and the x-axis by starting pointers at both ends and moving the pointer at the shorter line inward, since moving the taller line's pointer can never increase the area.
recognitionCues: asks for maximum area/water contained between two lines
brute force O(n^2), hints at O(n) two-pointer solution
approach: Place left pointer at start, right pointer at end. Compute area as min(height[left], height[right]) * (right - left), track max. Move the pointer at the shorter height inward, since that's the only way area could increase. Repeat until pointers meet.
